raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> A person named XXXX XXXX flew XXXX XXXX from XXXX to XXXX. My citibank Aadvantage MC that I haven't used in at least 2 years and kept locked up at home was somehow used to purchase upgraded seats on the flight. My card was charged XXXX. This account has had a XXXX balance so upon receipt of the bill I called citibank and reported the fraudulent charge. XX/XX/year> I received a letter with the passengers name and contact info and a letter stating that cardholder authorized transaction and booked the reservation. I then filed a police report locally ( TN ) I tried to file a police report in IL, the address of the passenger, and they refused and referred to the FBI internet crime division. I am the cardholder and I do not know the person who used my credit card.
